name: Stripe Billing
description: Subscription billing and invoicing infrastructure for recurring revenue businesses that need flexible plans, usage pricing, dunning, and payment automation.
whyUseIt: Stripe Billing helps founders tighten cash collection, automate renewals, and reduce failed payments. It matters when pricing and payment structure are central to runway.
aiCapabilities: Stripe uses automation for smart retries, payment recovery, fraud scoring, failed payment workflows, and revenue reporting across billing cohorts.
